title: Fix coin counter bug and reposition minimap + joystick

requirements.text: Fix the coin collection counter in SpaceSnakeMissionBanner and useSpaceSnakeGame so that it correctly initializes at 0 and increments by the actual number of coins collected per pickup event. The counter must not go negative or overflow into large negative numbers as seen in the screenshot showing '-203223/30'.

quotes: the coin collection was not working right when I start the coin was 0 and when I collected one coin the coin collection was one

acceptanceCriteria: Coin counter initializes to 0 at game start
Each coin pickup increments the counter by exactly 1 (or the correct coin value)
Counter displays correctly as 'collected/target' (e.g., '1/30') with no overflow or sign errors

requirements.text: Move the SpaceSnakeMinimap component from the right side of the screen to the top-left corner in SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx.

quotes: the map in right side move it left top side

acceptanceCriteria: Minimap is positioned at the top-left corner of the screen
Minimap does not overlap the mission banner or other top-center HUD elements
Minimap remains fully visible and does not clip off screen edges

requirements.text: Move the SpaceSnakeJoystick component slightly upward in SpaceSnakeScreen.tsx so it is not sitting at the very bottom edge of the screen.
acceptanceCriteria: Joystick is visually raised from the bottom edge by a noticeable margin (e.g., at least 16–24px or equivalent spacing)
Joystick remains in the lower-left area of the screen and is fully accessible via touch

constraints: Do not change the backend coin storage or room state schema
Do not modify any files under frontend/src/hooks/ or frontend/src/components/ui
nonGoals: Adding new coin types or changing coin values
Redesigning the HUD layout beyond minimap and joystick repositioning
